scenarios.label: Stressed Focus
scenarios.transcript_override: I have too much to do and I cannot focus right now.
scenarios.notes: Use this to demo a calming, grounded response.

scenarios.label: Excited Win
scenarios.transcript_override: I just finished my project and I am really excited about it.
scenarios.notes: Use this to show an upbeat response style.

scenarios.label: Sad Support
scenarios.transcript_override: I have been feeling down today and I could use encouragement.
scenarios.notes: Use this to show warm, supportive behavior.

scenarios.label: Remember Preference
scenarios.transcript_override: Please remember that I like short answers.
scenarios.notes: Use this before a follow-up prompt to demo preference memory.
